envVars.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
envVars.description: Your Simmer SDK API key from simmer.markets/dashboard.

envVars.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
envVars.description: Optional. Only needed for external-wallet self-custody trading on supported venues.

envVars.name: MARKET_QUERY
envVars.description: Keyword query used to discover markets. Default: bitcoin.

envVars.name: FAIR_PROBABILITY
envVars.description: Your estimated YES probability from 0 to 1. Default: 0.60.

envVars.name: MIN_EDGE
envVars.description: Minimum edge required before placing a trade. Default: 0.05.

envVars.name: MAX_MARKETS
envVars.description: Maximum number of markets to inspect each run. Default: 5.

envVars.name: MAX_SLIPPAGE_PCT
envVars.description: Skip trades when estimated slippage exceeds this threshold. Default: 0.15.

envVars.name: TRADING_VENUE
envVars.description: Trading venue to read and trade on. Supported values in this template: sim or polymarket. Default: sim.

envVars.name: SIMMER_ENABLE_LIVE
envVars.description: Set to true to permit live trading in automation. Default: false.
